biography: A familiar face in past Hector Trophée tournaments, Ricke is known for his calm demeanor on the course and his meticulous approach to the game. Though he keeps his emotions in check, those close to him know that Ricke is a fierce competitor with an unyielding desire to improve.

While details about Ricke's home club remain a mystery, his dedication to golf is evident in his past appearances at the Hector Trophée. He has participated in the tournament twice but has yet to secure a victory in either the team or individual events. Ricke is currently considered to be retired from Hector Trophée, and he is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. However, golf enthusiasts know that anything can happen, and there is always a chance that he might decide to make a return.
